# go-dblog

`go-dblog` is a multi-module Go library for parsing database change logs and
adapting them to a shared event API.

## Modules

- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog`: common registry, event, checkpoint, filter,
  and flashback contracts.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mysql`: MySQL-family binlog parser.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/postgres`: PostgreSQL logical decoding text
  parser.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mongo`: MongoDB oplog and change stream JSON
  parser.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/redis`: Redis AOF RESP parser.

## Key Files

- `README.md`: feature overview, examples, backend package layout, inline
  contribution notes, and roadmap pointer.
- `ROADMAP.md`: release line, capability matrix, workstreams, and versioning
  rules.
- `doc/doc_zh.md`: Chinese documentation.
- GitHub Releases and Git tags: public release record; git history is the
  detailed change log.
- `SECURITY.md`: vulnerability reporting policy.

## Checks

```bash
make lint
make test
make fuzz-smoke
make bench-smoke
```

Run fixture-backed integration tests when Docker is available:

```bash
make integration
```
